source_pr.title: executor: support recovery mem limit error in disagg tiflash mode
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #49574

Problem Summary: Support mpp error recovery. This pr only support recovery MemLimit error.

### What changed and how does it work?
1. TiDB hold mpp result for n*MaxChunkSize rows
2. During holding result, if got mem limit error, will send recovery http request to AutoScaler(with ori CN cnt, and AutoScaler will check ori CN count to scale out new CN)
3. For now, I didn't add sys var, instead use hard code value. Because for master, mpp recovery will not take effccts. It only works for Serverless Tier(or with AutoScaler). So no need to ask PM to add new sys var, and I will add sys var when cherry pick to Serverless Tier repo
4. AutoScaler changes: https://github.com/tidbcloud/tiflash-autoscale/pull/33

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

1. Create EKS cluster on AWS. Internal doc describe this.
    1. Two c5.xlarge EC2 node(4c8g for each one)
    5. Limit CN config 3G by setting `profiles.default.max_memory_usage and max_memory_usage_for_all_queries`
    6. AutoScaler config: min-pod: 1, max-pod: 4
2. Load tpch10 dataset
7. Run workload: `tiup bench tpch run -U root -D tpch10 --queries q1 -T 5 --conn-params tidb_isolation_read_engines='tiflash'`

Before this pr: `tiup bench` will report error
![img_v3_0269_9d921829-ac27-4d9f-896a-384a00b5ea5g](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/7493273/1a5d7bc4-dba1-4c2d-935a-7b56234b2a9b)

After this pr: `tiup bench` run successfully
![img_v3_0269_146fa439-9273-4243-addf-71cc5a030c8g](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/7493273/c2a81072-786b-442b-a9cf-e44918df2795)

- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: MPP query may fail with a Memory Limit error in disaggregated TiFlash mode; recovery behavior depends on autoscaler/topology.
failure_signature: MPP query hits "Memory Limit" error (disagg TiFlash); expected to trigger recovery instead of failing the workload.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds MPP error recovery (currently only for Memory Limit errors) in disaggregated TiFlash mode and introduces related tests. The available case evidence does not clearly capture a specific flaky failure mode or why the previous behavior was flaky, so we keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: Add an MPP error-recovery path for Memory Limit errors: hold a bounded amount of MPP results and, on mem-limit error, trigger an autoscaler recovery/topology refresh and retry MPP dispatch.

evidence: evidence: race = "on", | sql := "select * from t order by 1, 2" (pkg/executor/test/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go)

files: pkg/executor/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/internal/mpp/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/internal/mpp/local_mpp_coordinator.go, pkg/executor/mpp_gather.go, pkg/executor/mppcoordmanager/mpp_coordinator_manager_test.go, pkg/executor/mpperr/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/mpperr/mpp_err_recovery.go, pkg/executor/test/tiflashtest/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go, pkg/kv/mpp.go, pkg/planner/core/fragment.go, pkg/store/copr/batch_coprocessor.go, pkg/util/tiflashcompute/topo_fetcher.go
